purpose: Starting seed file for telemetry-first GT7 track modelling in NGR Pit Crew.
critical_rules: Public web data is seed data only, not authoritative engineering truth.
Exact x/y/z coordinate mapping must come from GT7 telemetry captured in the selected track/layout.
GT Engine track map images are visual references only and must not be used as exact coordinate maps.
Unknown camber, kerb, banking, bump and corner-segment details must remain unknown until modelled or validated.
Track geometry must be separated from Porsche 911 RSR calibration behaviour.

gt_engine_track_maps.name: GT ENG!NE GT7 Track Maps
gt_engine_track_maps.notes: Source states GT7 has 41 locations / 49 tracks / 121 layouts at Ver. 1.65. Track map images are visual references only, not telemetry coordinate maps.

dg_edge_tracks.name: DG Edge GT7 Tracks Database
dg_edge_tracks.notes: Visible location cards include variant counts. Variant-count methodology differs from GT Plus and GT ENG!NE for some tracks.

gtplus_tracks.name: GT Plus GT7 Tracks / Layouts
gtplus_tracks.notes: Used as public seed data only. Must be refined by GT7 telemetry and user validation.

gtplus_porsche_911_rsr.name: GT Plus Porsche 911 RSR (991) '17
gtplus_porsche_911_rsr.notes: Car facts are public seed data only; actual calibration setup should be locked in-app.

reasoning: User is most familiar with this car.
Fast enough to expose real braking, aero, kerb and traction behaviour.
Stable Gr.3 benchmark for repeatable tarmac calibration laps.
calibration_car_profiles.data_rule: Track geometry remains car-independent. Braking points, gear usage, throttle behaviour, tyre stress and exit-drive evidence from this car must be stored as Porsche calibration behaviour, not universal track truth.

layouts.notes: Physical layout facts copied from forward layout; reverse telemetry map must be separately calibrated.
Physical layout facts copied from forward layout; reverse telemetry map must be separately calibrated.
Physical layout facts copied from forward layout; reverse telemetry map must be separately calibrated.

future_track_segment_schema.segment_name: T1 Entry / T1 Apex / Main Straight etc
